Security
Secure • Decentralized • Trustless

Your Digital Legacy,
Protected Forever.

A robust, zero-trust system verifying automated transfers of your digital assets via cryptographic heartbeats.

Read Specifications
AES-256-GCM IPFS Polygon
The Multi-Billion Dollar Problem

Billions in Crypto Are Lost Forever
When Owners Pass Away.

Hardware wallets, paper seed phrases, and complex DeFi positions are entirely dependent on you staying alive. If tragedy strikes with no succession plan, your decentralized wealth becomes permanently inaccessible to your family.

Seed phrases hidden in safes are easily lost or stolen.
Custodial exchanges require lengthy, painful legal battles.
Loved ones lack the technical knowledge to recover assets.

The Legacy Dilemma

Comparing traditional vs. decentralized inheritance.

Traditional LawyersSlow, Expensive, Public
Hardware WalletsSingle Point of Failure
Digital Will ProtocolTrustless, Instant, Automated
The Mechanism

How DWP Secures Your Future.

1. Zero-Knowledge Encryption

You paste your seed phrases locally. The AES-256 key is split via Shamir's Secret Sharing. We never see your data.

2. The Heartbeat Contract

A smart contract on Polygon holds the vault state. You prove you are alive by sending a free, gasless signature every X months.

3. Automated Execution

If the countdown timer reaches zero without a heartbeat, the network unlocks the shards. Beneficiaries claim access cryptographically.

Core Infrastructure

Enterprise-Grade Security.

Zero Trust Architecture

Your data is encrypted client-side. Our servers never touch your plaintext inputs. Verification happens natively via cryptographic primitives.

  • Client-side AES-256-GCM encryption
  • No server access to private keys

Shamir Secret Sharing

Keys are split into 5 fragments across decentralized storage nodes, requiring a M-of-N threshold quorum to reassemble the payload.

Security Model
01

Creating Assets

Upload docs & keys to encrypt natively.

02

Encrypt & Split

AES-256 secures it, Shamir's splits keys.

03

Heartbeat

Periodic cryptographic proof-of-life ping.

04

Auto-Release

Polygon contract fires on heartbeat decay.

Digital Will Protocol

Securing digital legacies for the decentralized future. Your assets, your rules.
